content.en:
"Start cultivating the Misty Eye Soul Technique!"

He had already obtained this misty eye soul technique in the Upper Domain, and many forces had it, and even sold it, but it was too rare and useless, and it was not sold publicly.

And after he inquired, he bought the Misty Eye Soul Inheritance from a certain force.

Now, he can directly cultivate.

I saw Ye Tian urging the seal of the Misty Eye Soul Technique, absorbing wisps of the energy breath of the Mist-Eyed Red Stone and integrating it into his body.

However.

The Mist-Eyed Soul Technique is not such an easy secret technique to cultivate, and once it fails, the consequences are quite serious, and it will directly cause the soul will to be severely damaged and the body damaged.

Really.

Ye Tian soon failed in his cultivation, his soul will was severely damaged, and his body cracked.

But he immediately let another copy body re-cultivate, and this copy body directly dissipated.

In the following days, Ye Tian used the energy here to practice the Misty Eye Soul Technique again and again, and it took many years to successfully practice the Misty Eye Soul Technique.

At this time, a strange eye appeared in the depths of his soul will, which meant that his misty eye soul technique had been cultivated to the level of the first eye, and this level could not evade the tracking and deduction of the ninth realm, and he still needed to continue to cultivate.

In order to prevent other Fog Shadow Spirits from disturbing his cultivation, he also sent the copy body to hide in the shadows, if a Fog Shadow Spirit came, he would directly lure it away, so that it would not disturb his cultivation.

Time passed, and one by one the years passed.

Six hundred years later, Ye Tian had already cultivated eight eyes, which was equivalent to reaching the eighth realm of the Misty Eye Soul Technique, and could resist the tracking and deduction of the eighth realm.

If you cultivate the ninth eye, you can resist the tracking and deduction of the existence of the ninth realm.

And he's about to practice.

Rumble!!!!!

A massive amount of mist shadow red stone's energy poured into Ye Tian's body, and the ninth eye gradually condensed in the depths of his soul will.

At a certain moment, nine eyes were connected in a picture, representing the ultimate realm of the Mist-Eyed Soul Technique.

From this moment on, the existence of the ninth realm could not even be deduced to any trace of him.

This is the real big getaway!

"Hahahaha, I have finally practiced the highest level of the Misty Eye Soul Technique~!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

However, he didn't think that this misty eye soul technique could resist all the deductions of the Ninth Realm, in case it was an invincible existence of the Ninth Realm who was good at deduction, that existence would still be able to deduce his traces, but the ordinary Ninth Realm would definitely not be able to deduce his traces.

For example, the Poison Dragon Realm Lord would never be able to deduce his traces.

That's enough!

Subsequently.

He dismantled all the replica bodies he had left here.

The Misty Eye Star didn't have any other chances, and it could only help him cultivate the Misty Eye Soul Technique, if there were other opportunities, there would have been many powerful Eighth Realms here.

Shortly thereafter.

All of Ye Tian's copied bodies have been replaced, and they all have the ninth-level misty eye soul technique, which can resist the deduction and tracking of the ninth realm.

At this moment, he was not worried that the investigation of the Ten Pyloric Gates would attract the tracking of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord.

this day.

Ye Tian has created a fourteenth dimensional will mastery, although it does not increase much in strength, but if it is used to hunt down the enemy, it will be very good.

In the years that followed, he even infiltrated the Ten Pyloric Sects and banned the identity of the Seventh Realm of the Ten Pyloric Gates.

Of course, it's just an ordinary seventh realm, and it doesn't communicate much with other seventh realms, so it's not easy to show flaws.

Besides, he will only replace his identity for a while, and there will be no trouble.

After mixing into the Ten Pyloric Gates, he could truly understand the Ten Pyloric Gates, and find the information of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord.

Soon.

Only then did he truly understand the power and heritage of the Ten Pyloric Gates, for example, the Ten Pyloric Gates had more than seventy treasures in the fifteenth dimension, and even occupied a star like the Ten Shadows as his headquarters, and only a few of the Eighth and Ninth Realms could cultivate in the Ten Shadows for a long time.

According to his understanding, the Ten Phantom Stars were a special multi-dimensional astral body, which was suitable for cultivating a dimensional domain body, the Ten Shadow Domain Body.

In the Ten Secluded Sects, it is very easy to cultivate the Ten Phantom Domains, and if the cultivation conditions are met, it is almost 100% able to cultivate.

Therefore, those ninth realms and a small number of eighth realms of the Ten Secluded Realms have all been cultivated into the Ten Secluded Realms.

But.

"The Ten Pyloric Sects are too rich, if I have the resources of the Ten Pyloric Sects, I can definitely rise faster!" Ye Tian muttered.

Since he wants to join forces with the Purple Yun Realm Lord to deal with the Ten Pyloric Gates, it is true that he cannot threaten the Ten Pyloric Sects at present, but it is also possible to take some interest from the Ten Pyloric Gates.

And so this day.

Through the identity of a member of the Ten Pyloric Gates, Ye Tian came to an area occupied by the Ten Pyloric Gates of the Fifteenth Dimension - the Nine Xuanwei River.

The Nine Xuanwei River has a special energy, which can condense a special Nine Xuanwei Golden Liquid here, which can improve the cultivation of the seventh realm, and even has a little effect on the eighth realm.

There are many Seventh Realms here that are condensing the Nine Xuan Golden Liquid, but it will take a long time.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the higher the realm of dimensional rules, the better the effect of condensing the Nine Xuan Golden Liquid.

The Ten Pyloric Sects can be so powerful, and the credit of the Nine Xuanwei River is very great, because of its existence, many members of the Ten Pyloric Sects do not need to slowly accumulate cultivation.

After Ye Tian came to the Jiuxuanwei River, he also honestly condensed the Jiuxuanwei Golden Liquid at the beginning.

But he (De Nuo) knew very well that no matter how hard he worked alone, he couldn't condense too much Nine Xuan Golden Liquid.

Therefore, he had a new plan, that is, to plunder the Nine Xuan Gold Liquid here.

There is a branch here in the Ten Pyloric Gate, and a large amount of Nine Xuanjin Liquid is stored here, and the Ten Pyloric Gate needs the Nine Xuanjin Liquid to come here to receive some Gan.

Usually, the Nine Xuan Gold Liquid is stored here.

In addition, there are two Eighth Realm guards in the Ten Pyloric Gates, as well as the protection of the formation, and it is very safe here.

Besides, no Eighth Realm dares to offend the Ten Pyloric Sects for the sake of some Nine Xuan Golden Liquid, isn't that looking for death!

But Ye Tian wanted to seize these Nine Xuan Golden Liquid, and when the time came, his cultivation would be enough, and he could also cultivate a large number of human powerhouses.

And so.

On this day, a copy of Ye Tian's body disguised his identity to attack here, he had the Fog Shadow Soul Technique, and he was not afraid of revealing his identity.
